zh.lifeSummary: Mary Canney是Thomas Canney和Mary Canney的女兒，於1637年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾多福。她於1655年與Jeremiah Tibbetts在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福 內可結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1706年12月14日在她的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Canney是Thomas Canney和Mary Canney的女儿，于1637年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾多福。她于1655年与Jeremiah Tibbetts在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福 內可结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1706年12月14日在她的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Canney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Canny
meanings: Irish: either a shortened variant of McCann or of McCanny, which is an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Annaidh ‘son of Annadh’ (a personal name of uncertain meaning). In their Anglicized forms the two surnames were confused.
Irish: from Ó Caithniadh ‘son of Caithnia’, a personal name meaning ‘battle champion’, Anglicized as Caheny or Canny.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: Mary Canney was born in 1637, in Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America as the daughter of Thomas Canney and Mary Canney. She married Jeremiah Tibbetts in 1655, in Dover Neck, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 December 1706, in her hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Canney est née en 1637, à Dover, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, fille de Thomas Canney et Mary Canney. Elle a épousé Jeremiah Tibbetts en 1655, à Dover Neck, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 décembre 1706, à Douvres, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Canney wurde 1637 in Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, als Tochter von Thomas Canney und Mary Canney geboren. Sie hat 1655 in Dover Neck, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Jeremiah Tibbetts geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Dezember 1706 im Alter von 69 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Canney è nata il nel 1637 nel Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America come figlia di Thomas Canney e Mary Canney. Lei sposato Jeremiah Tibbetts nel 1655, nel Dover Neck, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 dicembre 1706, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Canneyは1637年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアドバーでThomas CanneyとMary Canneyの娘として生まれた。1655年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバー ネックでJeremiah Tibbettsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1706年12月14日に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Canney(은)는 1637년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 도버에서 Thomas Canney(와)과 Mary Canney의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1655년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버 니크에서 Jeremiah Tibbetts(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1706년 12월 14일 그녀의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Canney nasceu em 1637, em Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America filha de Thomas Canney e Mary Canney. Ela casou-se com Jeremiah Tibbetts em 1655, em Dover Neck, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1706, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Canney родилась в 1637 г. в местности довир, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. Её родителей звали Thomas Canney и Mary Canney. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jeremiah Tibbetts в 1655 г. в местности довир некк, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 декабря 1706 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Canney nació en 1637, en Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America como hija de Thomas Canney y Mary Canney. Se casó con Jeremiah Tibbetts en 1655, en Dover Neck, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de diciembre de 1706, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
